segments.text: You pay thousands for a first AC ticket because you think it is safe. But this design flaw is terrifying. Just one viral video forced Indian railways to redesign their most premium coaches.
Usually when you open a cabin door, you expect a corridor. But in this specific forced AC layout, the door opened directly next to the exterior gate.
If you step out of the cabin at night or in a rush, one wrong step could send you directly onto the tracks. It was a gate to hell design. He did not just
complain, he filmed it. The video exploded on social media exposing how luxury ignored basic user safety. The impact was instant. The rail coach
factory in Kapoor Tala quickly admitted the flaw and announced an immediate redesign for all of their future coaches. This proves that good design
can save lives. For more design awareness, subscribe.
